SEARCH
Package com.gcu.controllers

Class UserController

java.lang.Object
com.gcu.controllers.UserController
@Controller public class UserController extends Object
UserController is responsible for handling user authentication and registration processes in the application. It provides routes for signing in, signing up, and signing out users. The controller interacts with the UserDatabaseService to validate user credentials during sign-in and to create new user accounts during sign-up. The controller also manages user sessions, allowing users to stay logged in across different pages of the application. When a user successfully signs in, their user information is stored in the session, and they are redirected to the character list page. If sign-in fails, an error message is displayed on the sign-in page. During sign-up, the controller checks if the desired username already exists in the database. If it does, an error message is shown on the sign-up page. If the username is available, a new user account is created with a default role of "USER", and the user is redirected to the sign-in page to log in with their new credentials.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    UserController(UserDatabaseService userDatabaseService)
    Constructor for UserController that initializes the UserDatabaseService dependency.

    Modifier and Type

    Handles POST requests to the "/signin" URL, processes the sign-in form data, and manages user authentication.

    Handles POST requests to the "/signup" URL, processes the sign-up form data, and manages user registration.

    Handles GET requests to the "/signin" URL and returns the name of the view to be rendered for the sign-in page.

  • Constructor Details

    • UserController

      public UserController(UserDatabaseService userDatabaseService)
      Constructor for UserController that initializes the UserDatabaseService dependency.
      Parameters:
      userDatabaseService - The UserDatabaseService instance that will be used to interact with the user database for authentication and registration operations.

  • Method Details

    • showSignInPage

      @GetMapping("/signin") public String showSignInPage()
      Handles GET requests to the "/signin" URL and returns the name of the view to be rendered for the sign-in page.
      Returns:
      The name of the view to be rendered, which is "signin" in this case.

    • showSignUpPage

      @GetMapping("/signup") public String showSignUpPage()
      Handles GET requests to the "/signup" URL and returns the name of the view to be rendered for the sign-up page.
      Returns:
      The name of the view to be rendered, which is "signup" in this case.

    • processSignIn

      @PostMapping("/signin") public String processSignIn(@RequestParam String username, @RequestParam String password, org.springframework.ui.Model model, jakarta.servlet.http.HttpSession session)
      Handles POST requests to the "/signin" URL, processes the sign-in form data, and manages user authentication.
      Parameters:
      username - The username entered by the user in the sign-in form.
      password - The password entered by the user in the sign-in form.
      model - The Model object used to pass data to the view in case of authentication failure.
      session - The HttpSession object used to manage the user's session if authentication is successful.
      Returns:
      If authentication is successful, redirects to the character list page. If authentication fails, returns the sign-in view with an error message.

    • signOut

      @GetMapping("/signout") public String signOut(jakarta.servlet.http.HttpSession session)
      Handles GET requests to the "/signout" URL, invalidates the user session, and redirects to the home page.
      Parameters:
      session - The HttpSession object representing the user's current session, which will be invalidated to sign out the user.
      Returns:
      Redirects to the home page ("/") after signing out the user.

    • processSignUp

      @PostMapping("/signup") public String processSignUp(@ModelAttribute UserEntity user, org.springframework.ui.Model model)
      Handles POST requests to the "/signup" URL, processes the sign-up form data, and manages user registration.
      Parameters:
      user - The UserEntity object populated with the data from the sign-up form, which contains the username and password entered by the user.
      model - The Model object used to pass data to the view in case of registration failure (e.g., if the username already exists).
      Returns:
      If the username already exists, returns the sign-up view with an error message. If registration is successful, redirects to the sign-in page.
